docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TRU-BRITE ENERGY MANAGEMENT INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ANAND, NARINDER DBA S & N FASHIONS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TRU-BRITE ENERGY MANAGEMENT INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ANAND, NARINDER DBA S & N FASHIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANAND, NARINDER DBA S & N FASHIONS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRU-BRITE ENERGY MANAGEMENT INC. DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO YUBA COUNTY DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
